title: elytrigia atherica
intro: Elytrigia atherica, also known as June grass or June grass inflorescence, is a type of flowering plant that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elytrigia atherica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Elytrigia atherica can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
